productDisplayName: Puma Women Opulence Logo Plus Purple T-Shirts
description: Composition Purple round neck t-shirt made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, that has a ribbed neckline, mega sleeves with ribbed cuffs and distressed look metallic cat logo on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in lukewarm water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron Do not dry clean Wash and iron inside out Use detergent for colours Take urban dressing to the next level with this purple t-shirt from puma. The distressed metallic cat logo graphic on the front lends a dose of glam to this tee. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes and a white hoodie for cool street style. Model Statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
